extension.name: OpenAPI Sampler
extension.author: MelForze
extension.shortDescription: OpenAPI Sampler for Burp with OpenAPI 3.1 support, request/response previews, auth profiles, incremental URL-list loading, and export/replay actions.
extension.longDescription: OpenAPI Sampler loads OpenAPI 2.0/3.0/3.1 specs from local files, URL lists, remote URLs, and Target context menu entries. It builds schema-aware requests with discriminator-aware examples, previews expected responses from OpenAPI examples or schemas, supports auth profiles, adds URL-list results incrementally as each spec is fetched, supports selected-operation server overrides, sends generated requests to Burp tools, and exports requests in multiple formats.
